5.1 -- Monte Carlo Dose Calculation (simplified slab)
slab L=20.0 cm, 40 depth bins, mu=0.150 /cm, p_abs=0.30
histories = 262144, E0 = 1024 quanta/photon
deposited = 187758080 of 268435456 quanta (69.9%), peak depth bin = 0
depth-dose (quanta per bin):
  7656960 7500544 7202560 7161600 6991488 6747904 6561280 6291200 6237824 5964544 5758208 5683072 5529984 5396992 5216512 5011328 4911104 4881280 4637696 4415104 4283392 4287104 4154496 4092160 3946624 3859072 3722880 3588992 3389440 3383680 3318528 3242112 3063040 3032448 2976896 2898048 2789120 2727296 2682240 2563328
RESULT: PASS (GPU dose tally matches CPU exactly)
